entry.title: Bill 93 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the State Grants – State Substance Abuse Prevention Coordination Grant account ($50,000)

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-11-05

View on the council site
